summary: Fix inbox loader stuck on step 4 and add optional hourly beep.

introduced: Optional hourly beep in Settings — Casio-style chime on the hour while Nucleus is running
fixed: Inbox loading overlay no longer gets stuck on “Loading inbox” — Gmail’s in-page navigations no longer re-trigger the loader
Overlay dismisses as soon as the inbox URL loads, with a 10-second fallback if navigation callbacks lag
